From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Square in Ningbo, China

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1e/Ningbo_Tianyi_Square.jpg/250px-Ningbo_Tianyi_Square.jpg)](/wiki/File:Ningbo_Tianyi_Square.jpg)

Tianyi Square

**Tianyi Square** ([Chinese](/wiki/Chinese_language "Chinese language"): 天一广场) was the biggest square in [Ningbo](/wiki/Ningbo "Ningbo"), [Zhejiang](/wiki/Zhejiang "Zhejiang") province, China designed by architect [Qingyun Ma](/wiki/Qingyun_Ma "Qingyun Ma").[[1]](#cite_note-nb-1)

## Location

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tianyi_Square&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Location")]

It is located in the Ningbo city centre, Zhongshan Road, [Haishu District](/wiki/Haishu_District "Haishu District"), covering an area of 200,000 square metres (49 acres).[[1]](#cite_note-nb-1)

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tianyi_Square&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: History")]

It was completed in 2002. The Square is surrounded by 22 different buildings with a European style. In the central part, there is an open area covering 350,000 square metres (86 acres) and a water area covering 6,000 square metres (65,000 square feet) which includes pools and fountain. There is a musical fountain in the central square, which is the highest one in [Asia](/wiki/Asia "Asia") with a height of 40 metres (130 feet). The fountain can turn into different shapes and styles, such as mineral-flower-style and waltz-flower-style. Near the fountain, there is a water screen where tourists can watch movies. The water screen is 20 metres (66 feet) high and 60 metres (200 feet) wide. There is also a typical Gothic Church in front of the square.

Tianyi Square is also the biggest multi-function square in [China](/wiki/China "China"). It won the prize for the best public art construction after being completed in 2003.

## Sections

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tianyi_Square&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Sections")]

The Square is divided into 10 sections, including supermarket area, retail area, electronics area, souvenir area, clothing area, hotel area, entertainment area, restaurant area, children’s area and a mixed area. There are a total of about 300 shops in the Square. Tian Yi Square provides tourists and citizens with a fashionable and pleasant paradise for relaxing and shopping. It is also a lively and important commercial area for business and trade in Ningbo.[[1]](#cite_note-nb-1)
